title: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Security
subtitle: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Configure anti-raid protection and server security settings.

antiRaid.title: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Anti-Raid Protection
antiRaid.description: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Enable automatic detection and response to coordinated raids, suspicious accounts, and destructive actions.

joinRate.title: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Join Rate Detection
joinRate.description: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Detect mass joins by monitoring the rate of new members joining.
joinRate.thresholdHint: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Number of joins to trigger detection
joinRate.windowHint: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Window in which joins are counted
joinRate.actionHint: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Action to take on suspected raid members

accountAge.title: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Account Age Filter
accountAge.description: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Automatically action accounts that are younger than a minimum age. Set to 0 to disable.
accountAge.minAgeHint: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] 0 = disabled. Accounts younger than this will be actioned.

antiNuke.title: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Anti-Nuke Protection
antiNuke.description: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Detect mass channel/role deletions and quarantine the responsible user by removing all their roles.
antiNuke.thresholdHint: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Number of deletions within 10 seconds to trigger quarantine

lockdown.title: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Auto-Lockdown on Raid
lockdown.description: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Automatically lock all channels when a raid is detected.
lockdown.whitelistedRolesHint: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Members with these roles will be exempt from raid detection.
lockdown.logChannelPlaceholder: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Channel ID for raid event logs...

events.title: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Recent Raid Events
events.description: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Timeline of detected raids, account age blocks, and lockdown events.
events.empty: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] No raid events recorded yet. Events will appear here when raid detection triggers.
